title: Template GCal invites

posts.author: NLI_admin (Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I’ve recently tried out the Google Calendar (GCal) integration and I was wondering if there was any way to have templated description in the GCal invite automatically added when the invite was created.
Some context - this is for facilitated deliveries of training and all of the invites have a template added to them which would include details of the delivery (Zoom link, briefing doc link, time of session etc). I’m trying to find a way to have the template added when the invite is created so the project team don’t have to add it to every invite (as they currently do).

Obvs, they will still need to add in the relevant Zoom links etc but to cut out this other step would help tremendously.

Thanks in advance

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lewis!

Is it possible for you to add the invite template in the description field when mapping the event?

Screen Shot 2023-08-14 at 2.37.43 pm1564×1128 61.9 KB

posts.author: NLI_admin (Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bianca,

Thanks for the tip! It worked in part… Just need to sort out the formatting and I think we’re there

image.png423×640 47.2 KB

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @NLI_admin ,

We recently launched the app Google Calendar Sync - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to set formatted event descriptions from your monday board columns. Also you can specify multiple people, email columns in invitees field to send invites to them in one go. It should fit your use case perfectly.

Screenshot 2024-08-14 at 1.31.30 PM1038×1576 94 KB
